items.title: Dak Prescott on George Pickens: We've worked as much as needed, comfortable with where he's at
items.summary: Pickens signed his franchise tag, but has not been at voluntary workouts.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Why Newcastle's history makers are breaking up
items.summary: Newcastle United ended a 70-year wait for a major domestic trophy by winning the League Cup last season but further members of that side look set to leave.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
